trade.builder.en: Build multi-leg options structures from templates — preview before arming.

trade.product.en: Trade Product — blended thesis, odds, chart levels, and legs for one symbol.

trade.thesis.en: Why take this trade — economics tags and catalyst context.

trade.odds.en: Historical win rate, PF, and DD from journal or backtest sample.

trade.chart_levels.en: Entry, stop, and target lines on the session chart (E/S/T).

trade.notes.en: Merged notes and AI summary — journal context for this setup.

trade.fill_preview.en: Expected fill vs ideal price — paper uses spread + 1 tick per leg.

trade.ntsl_arm.en: Export NTSL strategy to Profit imports folder — confirm before write.
